label: 棋盘格道路-路段抖动
description: 规则网格路段在交叉点之间被分为若干小节，每节随机垂直抖动（竖向路段左右抖，横向路段上下抖），路网在交叉点处始终对齐保证连通。
description-en: Regular grid road segments are divided into sub-segments with random perpendicular jitter (vertical roads jitter left/right, horizontal roads jitter up/down); intersections stay aligned to preserve connectivity.
icon: 俯视路网小图标，横竖道路线在段落间有轻微锯齿状折弯，路口处对齐汇合，整体仍是棋盘格骨架，深色背景配白色折线，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: inputGrid
inputs.label: 输入网格
inputs.description: 源掩码网格，所有非零单元格均视为可生成道路的区域
inputs.description-en: Source mask grid; any non-zero cell is treated as a valid road-generation area.

inputs.name: mainSpacing
inputs.label: 主路间距
inputs.description: 主路网格间距（单元格数），推荐 12–40
inputs.description-en: Spacing between main road lines in grid cells. Recommended 12–40.

inputs.name: subSpacing
inputs.label: 辅路间距
inputs.description: 辅路网格间距（单元格数），推荐 4–30，需小于主路间距
inputs.description-en: Spacing between sub-road lines in grid cells. Recommended 4–30, must be less than mainSpacing.

inputs.name: mainRoadWidth
inputs.label: 主路宽度
inputs.description: 主干道宽度（单元格数），推荐 2–6
inputs.description-en: Main road thickness in grid cells. Recommended 2–6.

inputs.name: subRoadWidth
inputs.label: 辅路宽度
inputs.description: 支路宽度（单元格数），推荐 1–3
inputs.description-en: Sub-road thickness in grid cells. Recommended 1–3.

inputs.name: jitterAmp
inputs.label: 抖动幅度
inputs.description: 路段中间节点最大垂直偏移量（单元格数），0 = 完全规则，推荐 0–8
inputs.description-en: Maximum perpendicular displacement of mid-segment waypoints in grid cells. 0 = perfectly regular. Recommended 0–8.

inputs.name: segmentCount
inputs.label: 每段分节数
inputs.description: 每段路（两交叉点之间）的分节数，值越大折弯越密集，推荐 2–8
inputs.description-en: Number of sub-segments per road segment between intersections. Higher = denser bends. Recommended 2–8.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 表示使用当前时间（每次结果不同）
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses current timestamp for a different result each run.

outputs.name: mainRoad
outputs.label: 主路
outputs.description: 主干道掩码网格：主路单元格 = 1，其余 = 0
outputs.description-en: Main road mask grid: main road cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: subRoad
outputs.label: 辅路
outputs.description: 支路掩码网格：支路单元格 = 1，其余 = 0
outputs.description-en: Sub-road mask grid: sub-road cells = 1, others = 0.

outputs.name: parcels
outputs.label: 地块
outputs.description: 多值地块网格：每个地块分配唯一整数ID（1, 2, 3…），非地块单元格 = 0
outputs.description-en: Multi-value parcel grid: each parcel has a unique integer ID (1, 2, 3…); non-parcel cells = 0.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 地块名称清单：包含每个实际存在地块的 {id, name} 条目
outputs.description-en: Parcel name list: [{id, name}] entries for every parcel that contains at least one cell.
